narrative:
Clark Hamersville (precinct in Brown County) has 881 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.5 percentage points.
